Blog posts support Docusaurus Markdown features, such as MDX. 提示 Use the power of React to create interactive blog posts. For example, use JSX to create an interactive button: <button onClick={() => alert('button clicked!')}>Click me!</button> Click me!

Docusaurus blogging features are powered by the blog plugin. Here are a few tips you might find useful. Simply add Markdown files (or folders) to the blog directory. Regular blog authors can be added to authors.yml. The blog post date can be extracted from filenames, such as: 2019-05-30-welcome.md 2019-05-30-welcome/index.md A blog post folder can be convenient to co-locate blog post images: The blog supports tags as well! And if you don't want a blog: just delete this directory, and use blog: false in your Docusaurus config.
Learn how to create, manage, and secure your CoinByte account, including security settings and identity verification.
How do I create and verify my account? How can I keep my account secure? How do I enable two-factor authentication? What should I do if I forget my password? How can I change my account information?

Create Account Learn how to create and set up your CoinByte account, including registration process and verification requirements. Understand CoinByte's verification process and requirements to ensure your account is compliant and secure.
How to safely update your profile, contact information, and account preferences.
How to safely recover account access when you've forgotten your password.

Securing your account is essential for safely using the CoinByte platform. We recommend: Using complex, unique passwords Enabling two-factor authentication Regularly checking account activity Not saving login information on public devices Being vigilant about phishing websites and fraudulent emails
If you have any questions about your account or security, please feel free to contact our customer support team, who will be happy to assist you.
You can change the email address linked to your CoinByte account in just a few steps. 💡 Important: This process requires access to both your current and new email inboxes.

Log in to your CoinByte account. Click on your profile icon and go to Account Settings. Select the Email section. Click Edit next to your current email address. Enter your new email address and confirm. A verification email will be sent to your new email. Click the verification link in that email to complete the update.
Check your Spam or Promotions folder. Make sure you typed your new email address correctly. You can resend the confirmation from the same settings page.
If you're unable to access your old email address or experience issues during the process, please contact our support team for manual assistance.

This article will guide you through creating your account. You can create an account using either our mobile app or the web platform.

Download the app: Download our mobile application from the relevant app store. [Placeholder for App Store Image/Link] [Placeholder for Google Play Image/Link] Open the app and tap 'Sign Up'. Enter your details: Fill in your email address, create a strong password, enter your phone number, and select your country of residence. Agree to Terms: Read and agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. Verify Email: Check your email inbox for a verification link and click on it. If you don't see it, check your spam folder. Verify Phone: You'll receive an SMS with a code. Enter this code in the app to verify your phone number. Secure Your Account: Set up your preferred method for securing your account (e.g., PIN, Biometrics). Account Created: Your account is now set up! You can proceed with identity verification.
documents.s: Create an account via the mobile app

documents.t: Go to the Registration Page: Navigate to our website's registration page. Enter Your Details: Provide your email address, create a secure password, enter your phone number, and select your country. Agree to Terms: Review and accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. Click 'Create My Account'. Verify Email: Look for a verification email and click the link inside. Check spam if needed. Verify Phone: Enter the verification code sent to your phone via SMS. Account Created: Your account is ready. The next step is identity verification.
documents.s: Create an account via the web platform

Learn how to safely recover your account access when you've forgotten your password.

If you've forgotten your CoinByte account password, follow these steps to reset it: Go to the CoinByte login page Click on the "Forgot Password?" link Enter your registered email address Solve the security verification (CAPTCHA) Click "Submit" to request a password reset link
CoinByte offers multiple methods to reset your password, depending on your account security settings:

Check your email for a password reset link (check spam/junk folders if necessary) Click on the reset link (valid for 30 minutes only) Create a new password following the security requirements Confirm your new password Complete the reset process by logging in with your new password

If you have 2FA enabled: Follow the email reset steps above After clicking the reset link, you'll need to verify your identity with your 2FA method Enter the verification code from your authenticator app or SMS Create and confirm your new password Log in with your new credentials

If you've lost access to your two-factor authentication device: Go to the login page and click "Forgot Password?" Enter your email and follow the initial steps On the 2FA verification page, click "Lost access to 2FA device?" Choose one of the recovery options: Use backup recovery codes (if previously saved) Complete additional identity verification Follow the guided recovery process Reset both your password and 2FA method

For your protection, the following security measures apply to password resets: Password reset links expire after 30 minutes Multiple failed reset attempts may trigger additional verification Account login will be temporarily locked after multiple incorrect password attempts You'll receive email notifications about password changes All devices will be signed out after a password reset

In some cases, especially for accounts with high value or suspicious activity patterns, additional verification may be required: Identity document verification Selfie verification Waiting period before full account access is restored Review by our security team

To avoid password recovery issues: Keep your email address and phone number up to date Save your 2FA backup codes in a secure location Consider using a password manager Enable multiple recovery methods Regularly review your account security settings
Check your spam/junk folder Verify you entered the correct email address Add support@coinbyte.com to your contacts Try the process again after 5 minutes Contact customer support if issues persist
documents.s: I didn't receive the password reset email. What should I do?

documents.t: Standard password reset: Immediate to 24 hours 2FA recovery: 1-3 business days Enhanced verification cases: 3-7 business days
documents.s: How long does account recovery take?

documents.t: Yes, for security reasons, we limit the number of reset attempts within a 24-hour period. If you exceed this limit, your account recovery will require manual review by our security team. Related Articles Create an Account Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) Account Security Settings Verification Guide Modify Account Information Password Recovery and Reset
documents.s: Is there a limit to password reset attempts?

Learn how to configure comprehensive security settings for your CoinByte account.

The Account Security Dashboard provides an overview of your account's security status. You can access it by: Logging into your CoinByte account Navigating to "Settings" > "Security" Reviewing your current security score and recommendations
Go to "Settings" > "Security" > "Password" Enter your current password Create a new password following the security requirements Confirm your new password Complete verification if prompted
Minimum 12 characters Include upper and lowercase letters Include at least one number Include at least one special character Avoid using personal information or common words
Enable notifications for: New device logins Unusual location logins Failed login attempts
Go to "Settings" > "Security" > "IP Whitelist" Add trusted IP addresses Enable IP restriction to only allow logins from whitelisted IPs
Go to "Settings" > "Security" > "Anti-Phishing" Create a unique code This code will appear in all official CoinByte emails
Review your recent account activity: Go to "Settings" > "Security" > "Activity Log" Check login history, including time, location, and device Report any suspicious activity immediately
View all active sessions Terminate any unrecognized sessions Set automatic session timeout periods

Configure how you receive security alerts: Go to "Settings" > "Notifications" > "Security Alerts" Choose your preferred notification methods (email, SMS, app) Select which types of events trigger notifications
We recommend changing your password at least every 3 months, or immediately if you suspect any security breach.
documents.s: How often should I change my password?

documents.t: If you notice any suspicious activity: Change your password immediately Enable or reset two-factor authentication Contact our support team Review and terminate all active sessions
documents.s: What should I do if I notice suspicious activity?

documents.t: For maximum security: Use all available security features Keep your contact information up to date Regularly review account activity Keep your devices and software updated Be vigilant against phishing attempts Related Articles Create an Account Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) Account Security Settings Verification Guide Modify Account Information Password Recovery and Reset
documents.s: How can I maximize my account security?

documents.t: Create an Account Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) Account Security Settings Verification Guide Modify Account Information Password Recovery and Reset
Learn how to safely update your profile, contact information, and account preferences on CoinByte.

To access your account settings: Log in to your CoinByte account Click on your profile icon in the top-right corner Select "Account Settings" from the dropdown menu Authenticate with your password or 2FA if prompted

You can update the following profile information: Navigate to "Account Settings" > "Profile" Update your information: Full name Date of birth Occupation Country of residence Click "Save Changes" Verify your identity using 2FA or email confirmation Note: Some information may require additional verification if changed.
To update your profile picture: Go to "Account Settings" > "Profile" Click on your current profile image Upload a new image (JPG, PNG formats, max 5MB) Crop and adjust as needed Click "Save"

To update your email address: Go to "Account Settings" > "Security" Click "Change" next to your email address Enter your new email address Verify with your current email and 2FA Check your new email for a verification link Click the verification link to complete the change

To update your phone number: Go to "Account Settings" > "Security" Click "Change" next to your phone number Enter your new phone number with country code Verify with 2FA or current phone SMS verification Enter the verification code sent to your new number

Customize your notification preferences: Go to "Account Settings" > "Notifications" Toggle on/off different notification types: Security alerts Transaction confirmations Price alerts News and updates Marketing communications Choose delivery methods (email, SMS, push notifications) Save your preferences

To change your language or regional settings: Go to "Account Settings" > "Preferences" Select your preferred language from the dropdown Choose your time zone Select your preferred currency display format Click "Save"

Manage your privacy settings: Go to "Account Settings" > "Privacy" Configure your privacy options: Trading history visibility Profile visibility to other users Third-party data sharing preferences Review and update your consent settings Save changes

Go to "Account Settings" > "Connected Accounts" View currently linked accounts Click "Link" next to the platform you want to connect Follow the authentication process To unlink, click "Unlink" and confirm the action

When modifying account information: Changes to critical information trigger security notifications Major changes may require enhanced verification There may be a 24-48 hour security hold on withdrawals after significant changes Keep all contact information current for account recovery purposes
Some information, particularly KYC details, may be locked after verification to prevent fraud. Contact support if you need to update critical identity information.
documents.s: I can't change certain information. Why?

documents.t: Most changes take effect immediately after verification. However: Email changes require verification of both old and new addresses Phone number changes require verification of the new number Major changes may require manual review (1-3 business days)
documents.s: How long do changes take to process?

documents.t: Minor updates typically won't affect your verification status. However, significant changes to identity information may require re-verification of your account. Related Articles Create an Account Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) Account Security Settings Verification Guide Modify Account Information Password Recovery and Reset
documents.s: Will changing my information affect my account verification status?

Learn about CoinByte's verification process and requirements to ensure your account is compliant and secure.
CoinByte offers a tiered verification system to meet various trading needs and regulatory requirements:
Email verification Phone number verification Trading limits: Up to 2 BTC per day
Government-issued ID verification Facial recognition verification Trading limits: Up to 100 BTC per day
Proof of address Source of funds declaration Unlocked withdrawal limits Trading limits: Unlimited
Register with your email address Verify your email through the confirmation link Add and verify your phone number Complete basic profile information

Navigate to "Account" > "Verification" > "Identity Verification" Select your country of residence Upload required documents: Valid government-issued ID (passport, driver's license, or national ID) Take a selfie for facial verification Wait for approval (typically 1-2 business days)

Complete Level 2 verification first Navigate to "Account" > "Verification" > "Enhanced Verification" Upload proof of address (utility bill, bank statement not older than 3 months) Complete the source of funds declaration form Wait for approval (typically 3-5 business days)

Passport Driver's license National ID card Residence permit Documents must be: Valid and not expired Clearly visible with all four corners showing Free from glare or reflections Unaltered and unmodified

Utility bill (electricity, water, gas) Bank statement Tax statement Internet or phone bill Documents must be: Less than 3 months old Show your full name and address Issued by an official organization In color and unaltered
Verification helps us: Comply with global regulations Prevent fraud Protect our users Provide higher deposit and withdrawal limits
documents.s: Why do I need to verify my account?

documents.t: Level 1: Immediate Level 2: Typically 1-2 business days Level 3: Typically 3-5 business days During peak periods, verification may take longer.

If your verification is rejected, you will receive a notification with the reason. Common reasons include: Blurry or unclear documents Expired documents Information mismatch Document tampering suspicion You can resubmit your verification with corrected documents. Related Articles Create an Account Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) Account Security Settings Verification Guide Modify Account Information Password Recovery and Reset
documents.s: What if my verification is rejected?

Learn how to effectively use our API.
Our API provides a comprehensive set of endpoints for: User management Data operations System configuration Integration features
Generate API key in settings Store securely Use in requests Rotate regularly
const apiKey = 'your-api-key'; const response = await fetch('https://api.example.com/v1/users', { headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } });
100 requests per minute 1000 requests per hour 10000 requests per day

try { const response = await api.getData(); } catch (error) { if (error.status === 429) { // Handle rate limit } else if (error.status === 401) { // Handle authentication } else { // Handle other errors } }
Use pagination for large datasets Implement retry logic Cache responses when possible Monitor usage patterns
Check our API documentation or contact support.
This guide covers advanced customization options for power users.
curl -X POST https://api.example.com/v1/endpoint \ -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{"key": "value"}'
Configure webhooks to receive real-time updates: Navigate to Settings > Webhooks Click "Add Webhook" Enter the endpoint URL Select events to monitor Save configuration
Enable caching Configure rate limits Set up load balancing Monitor resource usage
Set up 2FA Configure IP whitelisting Manage API keys Set up audit logging

Example script for automation: const api = require('example-api'); async function automateTask() { try { const result = await api.performAction(); console.log('Task completed:', result); } catch (error) { console.error('Error:', error); } }
Always test in staging first Keep backups of configurations Monitor performance impact Document custom changes
For complex customizations, consider reaching out to our professional services team.
Learn how to set up and use two-factor authentication to enhance the security of your CoinByte account.

Two-factor authentication (2FA) is an additional security layer that requires you to provide two different types of identification information when logging in: Something you know (your password) Something you have (your phone or authenticator app) This significantly improves your account security, as even if someone obtains your password, they cannot log in without the second factor.

CoinByte supports the following 2FA options: Google Authenticator / Authy: Generates 6-digit one-time verification codes SMS Verification: Sends verification codes to your registered phone Email Verification: Sends verification codes to your email Hardware Security Keys: Physical security devices such as YubiKey

Go to "Account Settings > Security" and select "Set Up Two-Factor Authentication" Choose the "Google Authenticator" option Download the Google Authenticator app (iOS or Android) Scan the displayed QR code with the app Enter the 6-digit verification code generated by the app to confirm setup Save the displayed backup recovery codes (to use if you lose your phone)
Go to "Account Settings > Security" and select "Set Up Two-Factor Authentication" Choose the "SMS Verification" option Confirm your phone number Enter the received verification code to complete setup

Enter your username and password You will be prompted for second-factor verification Depending on your chosen method, enter the verification code or use your hardware key You will be logged in after successful verification

If you can't access your 2FA device: Click "Can't access 2FA device?" on the login page Choose to use recovery codes or contact support If using recovery codes, enter the backup recovery code you saved during setup After identity verification, you can set up 2FA again

Never share your 2FA verification codes with anyone Keep your backup recovery codes in a secure place Regularly check your login activity Consider using multiple 2FA methods for enhanced security Related Articles Create an Account Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) Account Security Settings Verification Guide Modify Account Information Password Recovery and Reset
Create an Account Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) Account Security Settings Verification Guide Modify Account Information Password Recovery and Reset

学习如何将加密货币充值到您的CoinByte账户。
登录您的CoinByte账户 导航至"钱包" > "充值" 选择您想充值的加密货币 复制生成的充值地址或扫描二维码 从您的外部钱包发送加密货币到此地址 等待网络确认后资金将显示在您的账户中
CoinByte支持多个区块链网络的充值，请确保选择正确的网络： 加密货币 支持的网络 确认时间 BTC Bitcoin 1-3确认 ETH Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism 12-15确认 USDT ERC20, TRC20, BEP20 网络不同 SOL Solana 32确认
为了确保您的资金安全并高效处理，我们设置了以下充值最低限额： BTC: 0.0001 BTC ETH: 0.01 ETH USDT: 10 USDT SOL: 0.1 SOL
始终仔细检查充值地址，发送至错误地址的资金无法找回 不同网络有不同的处理时间，请耐心等待 确保您发送的是我们支持的加密货币，否则可能导致资金丢失 对于较大金额的充值，我们建议先进行小额测试
如果您的充值在预期时间内没有到账，请检查以下几点： 确认交易是否已在区块链上确认 验证您使用了正确的充值地址和网络 检查充值金额是否达到最低要求 联系客户支持并提供交易哈希(TXID)以获取帮助
documents.s: 我的充值没有到账怎么办？

documents.t: 了解如何在CoinByte平台上安全、快速地进行加密货币和法定货币的充值与提现操作。
CoinByte支持多种资产的充值和提现： 加密货币：BTC、ETH、USDT、SOL等主流加密货币 法定货币：CNY、USD、EUR、GBP、JPY等 每种资产都有其特定的充值提现渠道、处理时间和费用结构。

加密货币充值 学习如何将加密货币充值到您的CoinByte账户，包括支持的网络和注意事项。 查看详情 法币提现 了解如何从CoinByte平台提现法币到您的银行账户或电子钱包。 查看详情 法币充值 了解如何使用银行转账、信用卡和其他支付方式充值法币。 查看详情 加密货币提现 学习如何安全地将加密货币从CoinByte提现到外部钱包。 查看详情 充值提现常见问题 解答有关资金存取的常见问题和疑虑。 查看详情 充值提现限额 了解CoinByte平台上不同账户等级的充值提现限额。 查看详情 支持的支付方式 详细了解CoinByte支持的所有充值提现渠道和方式。 查看详情 充值提现手续费 了解各种充值提现方式的费用结构和计算方式。 查看详情

了解CoinByte平台上不同账户等级的充值提现限额。
详细了解CoinByte支持的所有充值提现渠道和方式。
了解各种充值提现方式的费用结构和计算方式。
不同类型的充值和提现有不同的处理时间： 资产类型 充值处理时间 提现处理时间 加密货币 根据网络确认时间，通常数分钟至数小时 通常1小时内，最长24小时 法定货币 银行转账：1-3个工作日 电子支付：即时至数小时 银行转账：1-5个工作日 电子支付：即时至24小时
CoinByte对不同的充值和提现方式收取不同的费用： 加密货币充值：大多数免费，部分网络可能收取小额网络费用 加密货币提现：根据网络和资产类型收取固定或百分比费用 法币充值：部分方式免费，部分方式收取0.5-2%的手续费 法币提现：根据提现方式和金额收取0.5-2%的手续费
为确保您的资金安全，充值提现时请注意： 仔细核对充值地址，错误的地址可能导致资金丢失 使用平台支持的网络和充值方式 首次提现需要完成身份验证和安全验证 大额提现可能需要额外的安全审核
充值没有到账怎么办？ 检查交易确认状态，联系客户支持提供交易哈希(TXID)。 提现被拒绝的原因是什么？ 可能是安全验证失败、超出限额或账户异常等原因。 如何跟踪充值提现状态？ 在"钱包"->"交易历史"中查看所有交易的状态和详情。
了解如何从CoinByte平台提现法币到您的银行账户。
CoinByte支持多种法币提现选项： 法币 支持的提现方式 CNY 银行转账、支付宝、微信支付 USD 银行转账、SWIFT EUR SEPA转账、银行卡 GBP 银行转账 JPY 银行转账
documents.s: 支持的法币和支付方式

documents.t: 登录您的CoinByte账户 导航至"钱包" > "提现" > "法币" 选择您要提现的法币类型 选择提现方式（银行转账、电子钱包等） 输入提现金额 填写收款信息（银行账户详情或电子钱包账号） 确认提现请求并完成安全验证 等待处理和到账
提现到银行账户需要提供以下信息： 开户银行名称 银行账号或IBAN 账户持有人姓名（必须与您的CoinByte验证姓名一致） 银行代码（如SWIFT/BIC码、银行行号等） 收款银行地址（国际转账时需要）
提现方式 费用 处理时间 银行转账 (CNY) 1% (最低10元) 1-2个工作日 支付宝/微信 (CNY) 0.5% 即时至数小时 SEPA (EUR) 1欧元 1-2个工作日 SWIFT (USD) 25美元 3-5个工作日 银行转账 (GBP) 2英镑 1-3个工作日

用户等级 单笔最低限额 24小时最高限额 月度最高限额 普通用户 100 CNY/15 USD 50,000 CNY/7,500 USD 200,000 CNY/30,000 USD VIP 1级 100 CNY/15 USD 200,000 CNY/30,000 USD 1,000,000 CNY/150,000 USD VIP 2级 100 CNY/15 USD 500,000 CNY/75,000 USD 3,000,000 CNY/450,000 USD 机构用户 1,000 CNY/150 USD 定制 定制
提现收款人姓名必须与您的实名验证姓名一致 首次提现到新银行账户可能需要额外验证 国际银行转账可能需要提供额外信息 部分国家/地区的银行可能收取额外手续费 提现金额超过特定限额可能需要额外审核
提现被拒绝的常见原因包括： 账户信息不匹配 安全验证失败 超出提现限额 账户存在异常活动 请检查提现详情中的拒绝原因，并联系客户支持获取帮助。
documents.s: 我的提现被拒绝了，怎么办？

documents.t: 国内银行转账通常在1-2个工作日内完成 电子钱包转账通常在数分钟至数小时内完成 国际银行转账可能需要3-5个工作日 在银行假日或系统维护期间可能会有延迟
您可以在"钱包" > "交易历史"中查看提现状态，状态包括： 待处理：提现请求已提交 处理中：正在处理您的提现 完成：资金已发送到您的账户 拒绝：提现请求被拒绝
documents.s: 如何跟踪我的提现状态？

Let's discover Docusaurus in less than 5 minutes.
Get started by creating a new site. Or try Docusaurus immediately with docusaurus.new.
Node.js version 18.0 or above: When installing Node.js, you are recommended to check all checkboxes related to dependencies.

Generate a new Docusaurus site using the classic template. The classic template will automatically be added to your project after you run the command: npm init docusaurus@latest my-website classic You can type this command into Command Prompt, Powershell, Terminal, or any other integrated terminal of your code editor. The command also installs all necessary dependencies you need to run Docusaurus.

Run the development server: cd my-website npm run start The cd command changes the directory you're working with. In order to work with your newly created Docusaurus site, you'll need to navigate the terminal there. The npm run start command builds your website locally and serves it through a development server, ready for you to view at http://localhost:3000/. Open docs/intro.md (this page) and edit some lines: the site reloads automatically and displays your changes.
了解如何在CoinByte平台上使用市价单进行快速交易。
市价单是一种以当前市场最优价格立即执行的订单类型。当您提交市价单时，系统会自动以市场上可用的最佳价格匹配您的订单，无需您指定价格。
快速执行：几乎立即完成交易 保证成交：只要有足够的交易深度，订单一定会成交 价格不确定性：实际成交价格取决于当前市场状况 适合快速入场/出场：在快速变动的市场中尤为有用
市价单最适合以下情况： 需要立即执行交易，时间优先于价格 市场波动较小，买卖价差较窄 交易量较小，不会对市场价格造成显著影响 市场流动性良好，有足够的订单深度
在交易页面选择您要交易的货币对 在订单表单中选择"市价"订单类型 输入您想买入/卖出的数量或总金额 检查订单信息和估计成交价格 点击"买入"或"卖出"按钮提交订单
滑点是指订单的实际成交价格与预期价格之间的差异。在流动性较低或市场波动较大的情况下，市价单可能会遇到较大滑点。
由于市价单是以当前可用的最佳价格成交，实际成交价可能会与下单时看到的价格有所不同，特别是在大额交易或市场波动较大时。
在极端情况下，如果市场流动性不足，您的市价单可能会分多个价格部分成交，或仅部分成交。
特性 市价单 限价单 执行速度 立即执行 等待价格达到指定水平 价格控制 无法控制成交价 可以指定最大/最小交易价格 成交保证 几乎总能成交 仅在价格达到指定水平时成交 适用场景 需要快速成交，市场流动性好 希望以特定价格交易，愿意等待
在流动性较低的市场避免使用大额市价单 使用市价单前先查看订单簿深度了解可能的成交价 考虑使用限价单设定价格上限/下限控制风险 在高波动市场中谨慎使用市价单
Learn how to trade cryptocurrencies on the CoinByte platform, master various trading tools and strategies.

Before trading cryptocurrencies on the CoinByte platform, you should understand: Different market types (spot, futures, margin) Common order types and their uses Basic trading interface operations Fee structure Risk management strategies
trading/basic-trading View Details trading/market-orders View Details

CoinByte offers various trading tools to help you develop trading strategies based on your investment goals and risk preferences: Short-term Trading: Capitalize on market volatility for short-term gains Long-term Holding: Achieve growth potential through regular investments and long-term holdings Quantitative Trading: Implement automated trading using our APIs and trading bots Arbitrage Trading: Profit from price differences between different markets

Cryptocurrency trading involves risks. We recommend that you: Only invest funds you can afford to lose Use stop-loss orders to limit potential losses Maintain a diversified portfolio Continuously learn and understand market dynamics
Enhance your trading experience with auxiliary tools provided by the CoinByte platform: Advanced charting tools Market depth analysis Trading history and reports Price alerts
This guide covers advanced troubleshooting techniques for complex issues.
# View application logs tail -f /var/log/app.log # Filter for errors grep "ERROR" /var/log/app.log
Use the built-in performance monitor Check system resource usage Analyze network traffic Review database queries
Symptoms: Slow queries Connection timeouts Data corruption Solutions: Optimize database indexes Check connection pool settings Monitor query performance Implement caching
Symptoms: Intermittent connectivity High latency Packet loss Solutions: Check network configuration Monitor bandwidth usage Test with different networks Review firewall settings
Restore from backup Use point-in-time recovery Rebuild indexes Verify data integrity
System restore Reinstall components Update configurations Test functionality
For complex issues, contact our support team.
This guide covers common issues you might encounter and how to resolve them.
Symptoms: Connection timeout errors Unable to reach the server Network errors Solutions: Check your internet connection Verify server status Clear browser cache Try a different browser
Symptoms: Delayed operations Timeout errors High latency Solutions: Check system requirements Clear cache and cookies Update to latest version Contact support if issue persists
Symptoms: Missing updates Inconsistent data Sync errors Solutions: Check network connection Verify permissions Force sync Check for conflicts
If you're still experiencing issues, please contact our support team or check our advanced troubleshooting guide.

学习如何在CoinByte平台上进行基础交易操作。
CoinByte交易界面包括以下几个主要部分： 市场列表: 显示所有可交易的货币对 价格图表: 提供实时价格走势和技术分析工具 订单簿: 显示当前市场的买卖订单 交易表单: 用于提交买卖订单 历史记录: 查看您的历史交易记录
CoinByte提供多种订单类型以满足不同的交易需求： 市价单: 以当前最优价格立即执行 限价单: 设定价格，当市场达到您设定的价格时执行 止损单: 当价格跌至指定水平时自动卖出 止盈单: 当价格涨至指定水平时自动卖出
选择您想要交易的货币对 决定是买入还是卖出 选择订单类型 输入交易数量和价格（如适用） 确认订单详情 提交订单
CoinByte采用分级费用结构，根据您的交易量和VIP等级确定费用比例： 交易等级 做市商费率 吃单费率 普通用户 0.1% 0.2% VIP 1 0.08% 0.16% VIP 2 0.06% 0.12%
使用限价单控制您的成交价格 设置止损单来限制潜在损失 不要把所有资金投入单一交易 在高波动性市场中使用市价单时要谨慎

Docusaurus creates a page for each blog post, but also a blog index page, a tag system, an RSS feed...

Create a file at blog/2021-02-28-greetings.md: blog/2021-02-28-greetings.md --- slug: greetings title: Greetings! authors: - name: Joel Marcey title: Co-creator of Docusaurus 1 url: https://github.com/JoelMarcey image_url: https://github.com/JoelMarcey.png - name: Sébastien Lorber title: Docusaurus maintainer url: https://sebastienlorber.com image_url: https://github.com/slorber.png tags: [greetings] --- Congratulations, you have made your first post! Feel free to play around and edit this post as much as you like. A new blog post is now available at http://localhost:3000/blog/greetings.
Documents are groups of pages connected through: a sidebar previous/next navigation versioning
Create a Markdown file at docs/hello.md: docs/hello.md # Hello This is my **first Docusaurus document**! A new document is now available at http://localhost:3000/docs/hello.

Docusaurus automatically creates a sidebar from the docs folder. Add metadata to customize the sidebar label and position: docs/hello.md --- sidebar_label: 'Hi!' sidebar_position: 3 --- # Hello This is my **first Docusaurus document**! It is also possible to create your sidebar explicitly in sidebars.js: sidebars.js export default { tutorialSidebar: [ 'intro', 'hello', { type: 'category', label: 'Tutorial', items: ['tutorial-basics/create-a-document'], }, ], };
Add Markdown or React files to src/pages to create a standalone page: src/pages/index.js → localhost:3000/ src/pages/foo.md → localhost:3000/foo src/pages/foo/bar.js → localhost:3000/foo/bar

Create a file at src/pages/my-react-page.js: src/pages/my-react-page.js import React from 'react'; import Layout from '@theme/Layout'; export default function MyReactPage() { return (

My React page

This is a React page

 ); } A new page is now available at http://localhost:3000/my-react-page.
Create a file at src/pages/my-markdown-page.md: src/pages/my-markdown-page.md # My Markdown page This is a Markdown page A new page is now available at http://localhost:3000/my-markdown-page.
Docusaurus is a static-site-generator (also called Jamstack). It builds your site as simple static HTML, JavaScript and CSS files.
Build your site for production: npm run build The static files are generated in the build folder.

Test your production build locally: npm run serve The build folder is now served at http://localhost:3000/. You can now deploy the build folder almost anywhere easily, for free or very small cost (read the Deployment Guide).
Docusaurus supports Markdown and a few additional features.

Markdown documents have metadata at the top called Front Matter: my-doc.md --- id: my-doc-id title: My document title description: My document description slug: /my-custom-url --- ## Markdown heading Markdown text with [links](./hello.md)

Regular Markdown links are supported, using url paths or relative file paths. Let's see how to [Create a page](/create-a-page). Let's see how to [Create a page](./create-a-page.md). Result: Let's see how to Create a page.

Regular Markdown images are supported. You can use absolute paths to reference images in the static directory (static/img/docusaurus.png): ![Docusaurus logo](/img/docusaurus.png) You can reference images relative to the current file as well. This is particularly useful to colocate images close to the Markdown files using them: ![Docusaurus logo](./img/docusaurus.png)

Markdown code blocks are supported with Syntax highlighting. ```jsx title="src/components/HelloDocusaurus.js" function HelloDocusaurus() { return

Hello, Docusaurus!

; } ``` src/components/HelloDocusaurus.js function HelloDocusaurus() { return

Hello, Docusaurus!

; }

Docusaurus has a special syntax to create admonitions and callouts: :::tip[My tip] Use this awesome feature option ::: :::danger[Take care] This action is dangerous ::: My tip Use this awesome feature option Take care This action is dangerous

MDX can make your documentation more interactive and allows using any React components inside Markdown: export const Highlight = ({children, color}) => ( { alert(`You clicked the color ${color} with label ${children}`) }}> {children} ); This is Docusaurus green ! This is Facebook blue ! This is Docusaurus green ! This is Facebook blue !
了解CoinByte平台的用户界面，帮助您更有效地使用平台各项功能。
了解如何下载、设置和使用CoinByte移动应用进行随时随地的加密货币交易。
如何自定义您的CoinByte账户设置以获得最佳使用体验。
了解如何设置和管理价格提醒、交易通知和系统公告。
了解如何参与CoinByte的推荐计划并赚取奖励。
学习如何更改应用语言和调整区域设置。
获取关于CoinByte平台使用的常见问题解答。
Docusaurus can manage multiple versions of your docs.

Release a version 1.0 of your project: npm run docusaurus docs:version 1.0 The docs folder is copied into versioned_docs/version-1.0 and versions.json is created. Your docs now have 2 versions: 1.0 at http://localhost:3000/docs/ for the version 1.0 docs current at http://localhost:3000/docs/next/ for the upcoming, unreleased docs

To navigate seamlessly across versions, add a version dropdown. Modify the docusaurus.config.js file: docusaurus.config.js export default { themeConfig: { navbar: { items: [ { type: 'docsVersionDropdown', }, ], }, }, }; The docs version dropdown appears in your navbar:

It is possible to edit versioned docs in their respective folder: versioned_docs/version-1.0/hello.md updates http://localhost:3000/docs/hello docs/hello.md updates http://localhost:3000/docs/next/hello
Let's translate docs/intro.md to French.
Modify docusaurus.config.js to add support for the fr locale: docusaurus.config.js export default { i18n: { defaultLocale: 'en', locales: ['en', 'fr'], }, };

Copy the docs/intro.md file to the i18n/fr folder: mkdir -p i18n/fr/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/current/ cp docs/intro.md i18n/fr/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/current/intro.md Translate i18n/fr/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/current/intro.md in French.

Start your site on the French locale: npm run start -- --locale fr Your localized site is accessible at http://localhost:3000/fr/ and the Getting Started page is translated. 警告 In development, you can only use one locale at a time.

To navigate seamlessly across languages, add a locale dropdown. Modify the docusaurus.config.js file: docusaurus.config.js export default { themeConfig: { navbar: { items: [ { type: 'localeDropdown', }, ], }, }, }; The locale dropdown now appears in your navbar:
Build your site for a specific locale: npm run build -- --locale fr Or build your site to include all the locales at once: npm run build
了解如何下载、设置和使用CoinByte移动应用进行随时随地的加密货币交易。
CoinByte移动应用适用于iOS和Android设备： iOS用户：从App Store下载 Android用户：从Google Play或官网下载APK文件
CoinByte移动应用提供完整的交易平台功能： 实时市场数据和价格图表 完整的交易功能（市价单、限价单等） 资产管理和资金转账 账户安全设置 市场新闻和通知 实时客户支持
打开CoinByte应用 使用现有CoinByte账户登录或创建新账户 完成身份验证（如果需要） 设置生物识别登录（指纹/面部识别） 配置推送通知首选项 自定义应用界面和主题
CoinByte移动应用使用底部导航栏提供快速访问主要功能： 首页：市场概览和热门币种 市场：所有交易对和价格信息 交易：交易界面 钱包：资产管理 我的：账户设置和个人中心
左右滑动在同级页面间切换 下拉刷新数据 长按交易对显示快捷操作 双指缩放调整图表比例
在市场页面找到您想监控的币种 点击价格提醒图标 设置目标价格和提醒类型 保存设置，当价格达到设定值时接收通知
移动应用支持多种图表工具和指标： 多种时间周期（1分钟至1周） 技术指标（MA、MACD、RSI等） 绘图工具（趋势线、斐波那契回调等） 横屏模式获得更大视图
在交易页面下单 在"订单"标签页查看活跃订单 点击订单可查看详情或取消 查看历史订单了解过往交易
设置生物识别登录增强安全性： 进入"我的" > "安全" 启用指纹/面部识别登录 按照提示完成设置
为敏感操作设置独立交易密码： 进入"我的" > "安全" > "交易密码" 设置6位数字交易密码 在提现和大额交易时使用
管理已授权登录的设备： 进入"我的" > "安全" > "设备管理" 查看所有登录过的设备 移除不再使用的设备
部分功能在离线状态下可用 重新连接网络后自动同步数据 交易操作需要网络连接 设置可选择仅在WiFi下更新数据
长时间使用时开启省电模式： 进入"我的" > "设置" > "省电模式" 启用省电模式减少后台数据刷新 仅在活跃使用时更新市场数据
如遇应用崩溃： 更新至最新版本 清除应用缓存 重启设备 如问题持续，联系客户支持
解决通知问题： 检查手机通知设置 确保应用有通知权限 验证"请勿打扰"模式未启用 重新登录应用
了解CoinByte平台的用户界面，帮助您更有效地使用平台功能。
CoinByte平台的主界面分为以下几个主要区域： 顶部导航栏: 包含主要功能菜单、账户信息和设置 侧边栏: 提供快速导航到平台各个部分 内容区: 显示当前选择的功能页面 底部信息栏: 包含帮助链接、法律信息和社交媒体链接
仪表盘提供您账户的概览，包括： 总资产价值统计 最近交易活动 价格提醒 市场趋势简报
市场页面显示所有可交易的加密货币： 按交易对筛选 价格、交易量和涨跌幅数据 收藏夹功能 快速进入交易页面
交易界面是执行交易操作的中心： 先进的图表工具 订单簿和市场深度 交易表单 历史订单管理
钱包界面管理您的所有资产： 资产总览 充值和提现功能 交易历史 资产转换工具
您可以根据自己的喜好自定义CoinByte界面： 暗色/亮色主题切换 交易界面布局调整 设置默认交易对 自定义价格提醒
CoinByte移动应用采用了适合小屏幕的布局设计： 底部导航菜单替代侧边栏 简化的交易视图 优化的触摸操作体验 推送通知功能
